title: Job Finding Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Job Finding Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Immigrants Migrants Seasonal Workers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF RELAY RESOURCES COMPETITIVE INTEGRATED EMPLOYMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides personalized career counseling, employment training, and employment guidance to individuals who experience barriers to employment. 5312 NE 148th Avenue Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Adults with disabilities and neurodivergent individuals. Includes those with physical limitations, learning disabilities, intellectual and/or developmental disabilities, and mental health conditions. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 261-1266 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RELAY RESOURCES COMPETITIVE INTEGRATED EMPLOYMENT
